content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Nurse
description: Legendary Maliwan class mod for Maya the Siren, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Restoration, Elated, Sweet Release, Sustenance, Suspension. Focused on healing and health regeneration.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +68% health regen rate, +58% action skill cooldown rate.
special.title: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
